name: Rain
description: Losowe błyski na klawiszach imitujące deszcz świetlny.
code:
brightness = params.get('brightness', 1.0)
color = params.get('color', [0, 150, 255])
rainbow = params.get('rainbow', True)
random.seed(int(t * 8))
for key_name, virtual_id in key_map.items():
    base = virtual_id * 3
    if base + 2 >= 384:
        continue
    intensity = random.random() ** 3 * brightness
    if rainbow:
        hue = random.random()
        r, g, b = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(hue, 1.0, intensity)
    else:
        r = color[0] / 255 * intensity
        g = color[1] / 255 * intensity
        b = color[2] / 255 * intensity
    matrix[base] = int(r * 255)
    matrix[base+1] = int(g * 255)
    matrix[base+2] = int(b * 255)
